> Thank you for contributing to Coraza WAF, your effort is greatly appreciated.
> Before submitting, please make sure your contribution follows the [Contribution guidelines](https://github.com/corazawaf/coraza/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before sending your pull request. Thanks!

**Make sure that you've checked the boxes below before you submit PR:**

- [ ] My code includes positive and negative tests.
- [ ] I have an appropriate description with correct grammar.
- [ ] I have read the [Contribution guidelines](https://github.com/corazawaf/coraza/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/corazawaf/coraza/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] My code is properly linted and passes pre-commit tests.

Thanks for your contribution :heart:
